scripts.syncdata: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s='../outputs/site_data';const d='public/site_data';if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){if(f.endsWith('.json'))fs.copyFileSync(s+'/'+f,d+'/'+f)}console.log('synced site_data ->',d)}else{console.log('no ../outputs/site_data; using committed public/site_data')}"
